content: ✈️ Attending IC2S2! 📄 Presenting a parallel talk and a poster, serving as a session chair📍 Burlington, Vermont
✈️ Attending CHI'26 in person! 📄 Presenting a paper, serving as SV.📍 Barcelona, Spain
🎙 Gave a talk at WikiConference 2025, Seoul.
✈️ Attending CSCW'25 in person! 📄 Presenting a paper, serving as SV.📍 Bergen, Norway
🎙 Gave a general-audience talk titled, <Anxiety in the Technosocial Era: How We Understand and Cope> at CityFarmers.
📄 Our survey paper is accepted to Journal of Computational Linguistics!
📄 Typing Cure paper is accepted to CSCW 2025!
✈️ Attending CHI 2025!📄 Presenting a paper, 🤝co-organizing a workshop.
🐯  I'll be joining Princeton as a PhD student in Fall 2025!
✈️ Honored to have received PhD offers from Princeton, U of Washington, U of Michigan, and Georgia Tech. Excited to attend the in-person visit days and decide which path fits best!
📄 My first-first-authored NAVER internship paper (ExploreSelf) is accepted to CHI 2025. See you in Yokohama, Japan!
🎵 Excited to start my research internship @NAVER AI Lab!
✈️ Attending NeurIPS 2023 in person!📍 New Orleans
✈️ Attending UIST 2023 in person!📍 San Fransisco

🐝 Starting my exchange semester at Georgia Tech. Go Jackets!
